info.title: OpenMRS REST API
info.description: OpenMRS REST API for managing electronic medical records. Provides endpoints for patients, persons, encounters, observations, visits, locations, concepts, drugs, programs, providers, forms, orders, and system administration. Used by Bahmni and other OpenMRS-based hospital management systems.

get.description: Retrieve a session token using Basic authentication. Returns session info and JSESSIONID cookie.

delete.description: End the current session and invalidate the session token.

post.description: An administrator can change the password for another user.
Change the authenticated user's own password.
